shorts.title: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​
shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: The AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos
shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.
shorts.content: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.
shorts.content_distilled: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties.

shorts.title: The Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom
shorts.title_distilled: Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom.
shorts.description: Archbald, Pennsylvania, a borough of fewer than 8,000 people, may soon be home to five massive data centers that, when completed, will rank among the largest in the world. While residents are worried that data centers will strain the electric grid and drive u…

shorts.title: Families frolick, hunt for Easter Eggs at playground
shorts.title_distilled: Families frolick, hunt for Easter Eggs at playground.
shorts.description: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Kids and families alike were frolicking around looking for eggs in an Easter Egg Hunt, this one at Saint Anthony's Playground in Dunmore. This is their ninth annual Egg Hunt, and there was no shortage of eggs to find. 2,000 eggs were hidden around for families to hunt and grab. [...]
shorts.content: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Kids and families alike were frolicking around looking for eggs in an Easter Egg Hunt, this one at Saint Anthony's Playground in Dunmore. This is their ninth annual Egg Hunt, and there was no shortage of eggs to find. 2,000 eggs were hidden around for families to hunt and grab. [...]
shorts.content_distilled: DUNMORE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — Kids and families alike were frolicking around looking for eggs in an Easter Egg Hunt, this one at Saint Anthony's Playground in Dunmore.

shorts.title: Family owned buisness helps firefighters with burgers
shorts.title_distilled: Family owned buisness helps firefighters with burgers.
shorts.description: THROOP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a tasty way to support a local fire company: Burgers, chicken, and fries top the menu at the Smash Hut Fundraiser. The Smash Hut is a family-owned business, and this is the first event held with the new owners. Hungry folks lined up as early as 11:00 a.m. [...]
